title: SLIDE 1: Premium Products
subtitle: First Slide - Purple Gradient
description: This is the FIRST slide with a purple gradient background. You should see this slide transition automatically every 5 seconds, or use the arrow buttons to navigate manually.

title: SLIDE 2: Innovation Hub
subtitle: Second Slide - Pink Gradient
description: This is the SECOND slide with a pink gradient background. Notice how the content changes and the indicators at the bottom show which slide is active.

title: SLIDE 3: Award Winner
subtitle: Third Slide - Blue Gradient
description: This is the THIRD slide with a blue gradient background. The slideshow will loop back to slide 1 after this. Try hovering to pause autoplay!
